Michelangelo Buonarroti

3 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Study for the Nude Youth over the Prophet Daniel (recto); Figure Studies for the Sistine Ceiling (verso)
by Michelangelo Buonarroti
Italy, 16th century · 1510–11 · red chalk over black chalk or charcoal
Study for the Nude Youth over the Prophet Daniel (recto)
by Michelangelo Buonarroti
Italy, 16th century · 1510–1511 · red chalk over black chalk or charcoal
Figure Studies for the Sistine Ceiling (verso)
by Michelangelo Buonarroti
Italy, 16th century · 1510–11 · red chalk heightened with traces of white
